name: Cai Yan

skills.name: Can't Touch This
skills.description: Periodic Passive Effect: Restores Health and gains a Movement Speedbonus when taking damage.

skills.name: Healing Hymn
skills.description: Continuously restores Health to nearby allies in range while gaining

skills.name: Earworm
skills.description: Fires a sound wave in the target direction, stunning and dealing damage to enemies hit. Sound waves bounce between nearby enemies.

skills.name: Tune of Tranquility
skills.description: Continuously heals the nearby ally with the lowest Health within rangewhile granting them increased Physical and Magical Defense.

tips: Cai Yan is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.3% win rate and 1.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Tranquility → Holy Grail → Augur's Word → Venomous Staff → Splendor.
Run Fate for stats that match Cai Yan's Support kit. Take Smite & Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Healing Hymn → Earworm → Tune of Tranquility → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
Cai Yan excels into Diaochan, Arke. Avoid blind picking into Gao Changgong, Mulan without team peel.

Cai Yan is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.9% — expect Cai Yan to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: Is Cai Yan good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Cai Yan is Tier S Support with 50.3% win rate, 1.3% pick rate, and 1.9% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Cai Yan build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Augur's Word, Venomous Staff, Splendor. Run Fate arcana with Smite & Heal. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Cai Yan?
faqs.answer: Pick Gao Changgong, Mulan into Cai Yan. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Cai Yan completes core items. Cai Yan struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Cai Yan counter?
faqs.answer: Cai Yan is strong into Diaochan, Arke according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Cai Yan when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Cai Yan good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Cai Yan is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.9% — expect Cai Yan to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: What lane should Cai Yan play?
faqs.answer: Cai Yan is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Cai Yan?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite & Heal. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Cai Yan or Dolia — which is better?
faqs.answer: Cai Yan vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Cai Yan has +4.3% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Cai Yan when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Cai Yan?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 1.9% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Support.
